seoTitle: Bolwarra vs Bon Accord — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bolwarra and Bon Accord. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bolwarra vs Bon Accord: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bolwarra and Bon Accord.
heading: Bolwarra vs Bon Accord — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bolwarra, Queensland and Bon Accord, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bon Accord has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bolwarra (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bolwarra or Bon Accord safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bolwarra has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Bon Accord scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bolwarra scores 62/100 for bushfire risk. Bon Accord scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bolwarra or Bon Accord?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bon Accord has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.4% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
